definition: A person who is concerned about the environment

definition: The state of a species no longer existing

definition: The gradual increase in the earth's temperature

definition: A predator at the top of the food chain

definition: A period of reduced activity in organisms

definition: A sequence of organisms where each is eaten by the next

definition: A complex system of interconnected food chains

Cows and rabbits are herbivores.
